title: The Return of Jesus: Signs of the Times
summary: “And when these things begin to come to pass, then look up, and lift up your heads; for your redemption draweth nigh.” (Luke 21:28). In the Book of I Chronicles 12, we read about the various tribes that joined ranks with David to fight against King Saul. All of them are mentioned in their thousands along with their bravery, except one tribe – Issachar. “And of the children of Issachar, which were men that had understanding of the times, to know what Israel ought to do; the heads of them were two hundred; and all their brethren were at their commandment” (I Chron 12:32). They numbered just 200, but they had a unique gift which no other tribe seemed to have: they “had understanding of the times, to know what Israel ought to do”. They may have been very few compared to the other tribes, but their gift of knowing the times and what to do compensated for their numbers. May God give us a tribe of Issachar which can discern the times we live in and what we ought to do for the glory of the Lord Jesus!
